headline_seed: Pope Leo Warns of Risks From A.I. in 42,300-Word Encyclical - The New York Times
draft_text:
Pope Leo XIV released a 42,300-word encyclical Monday warning that AI is fueling warfare and some weapons are "practically beyond" human control. NBC News and Reuters confirm the document calls to "disarm" AI — not merely regulate it.

And that's the mews.
